title: Unique Peppery Spanish Egg Crema Catalana
description: A solo dinner Spanish dish featuring egg roll wrappers and a peppery flavor, made in a crema catalana form, low sodium friendly.

ingredients.name: chicken breast
ingredients.notes: boneless, skinless, cut into small pieces

instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a bowl, whisk together eggs, black pepper, smoked paprika, garlic powder, and salt free seasoning.
Add the chicken breast pieces to the bowl and mix until they are fully coated with the egg mixture.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium high heat and cook the chicken until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the low sodium chicken broth to the skillet and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and let simmer for 5 minutes.
Lay an egg roll wrapper on a flat surface and place a few pieces of the chicken mixture in the center of the wrapper.
Fold the bottom half of the wrapper over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll up the wrapper to form a tight cylinder.
Place the rolls seam side down in a baking dish and repeat with the remaining wrappers and filling.
Bake the rolls in the preheated oven for 15 minutes, or until golden brown.
Serve the Unique Peppery Spanish Egg Crema Catalana hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
